hero.heading: Cloud API or QR Code.
hero.subtitle: Two connection methods, one platform. Choose the best fit for your company and start automating.

cloudApi.title: Cloud API (Official Meta)
cloudApi.description: Official connection via Meta's WhatsApp Business API. Guaranteed compliance, unlimited scale, and full auditability. Ideal for companies that need regulatory compliance.
cloudApi.idealFor: Ideal for: Enterprise, Fintechs, Banks, Insurers

qrCode.title: QR Code (Baileys)
qrCode.description: Instant connection via QR Code. No approval, no waiting. Perfect for quick testing, POC validation, and smaller-scale operations.
qrCode.idealFor: Ideal for: Startups, Testing, POCs, SMBs

decisionGuide.heading: Which one to choose?
decisionGuide.subtitle: Not sure which method is right? Use this quick guide to decide.

cloudApi.title: Choose Cloud API if...
scenarios: Your company is regulated (fintech, bank, insurer)
You need audit trail and compliance
You want a green verification badge

qrCode.title: Choose QR Code if...
scenarios: You want to start testing in minutes
You're validating an MVP or POC

items.question: Can I use both methods at the same time?
items.answer: Yes. Catalisa supports Cloud API and QR Code simultaneously. You can use Cloud API for your main number and QR Code for test or secondary numbers.

items.question: Can I migrate from QR Code to Cloud API later?
items.answer: Yes. Migration is simple and doesn't affect your workflows. Just configure the Cloud API and reconnect — all workflows, agents, and settings continue working.

items.question: Does Cloud API have per-message costs?
items.answer: Yes. Meta charges per conversation in 24-hour windows. User-initiated conversations are free (first 1,000/month). Business-initiated conversations follow Meta's official per-country pricing.

items.question: Can the QR Code be blocked by WhatsApp?
items.answer: QR Code uses the Baileys library, which is not official from Meta. For production use with high volume, we recommend Cloud API to avoid blocking risks and ensure compliance.

items.question: Do I need a dedicated phone number?
items.answer: For Cloud API: yes, you need a number verified through Meta Business Manager. For QR Code: you use your existing WhatsApp number.

items.question: How long does Cloud API approval take?
items.answer: Meta Business Manager approval takes 3 to 5 business days. After approval, connection is instant. Our team helps throughout the entire process.

items.question: Is Catalisa an official Meta partner?
items.answer: Yes. Catalisa uses Meta's official WhatsApp Business API (Cloud API), with access to all features and guaranteed compliance.

cta.heading: Ready to connect your WhatsApp?
cta.subtitle: Our team helps you choose and set up the ideal method for your company.
